suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Lucide React import sorting convention: imports from lucide-react should be sorted alphabetically (e.g., `import { User, Store }` not `import { Store, User }`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature demo-page-component has non-blocking issue: Lucide imports not sorted alphabetically per project convention mentioned in CLAUDE.md

rejectedObservations.observation: Inline style vs Tailwind animate pattern in login.tsx
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking UX preference, not a functional issue

rejectedObservations.observation: GET body data to pass query params is unconventional
rejectedObservations.reason: Works correctly, minor style preference not worth documenting

rejectedObservations.observation: Race condition with redirect in onSuccess
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking concern - implementation works correctly in practice
